query:
UPDATE tasks SET
                            reopen_count = 0,
                            continuation_count = 0,
                            intervention_count = intervention_count + 1,
                            last_intervention_at = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%fZ'),
                            updated_at = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%fZ')
                         WHERE id = ?
